subject: Solar assigned read-only WS1.4 review prep
body:
Coordinator update from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

Solar Gliding Twilight now has a non-overlapping read-only support job for WS1.4: prepare the review and acceptance lens while you implement. Solar should not edit files, touch git/index, or treat your WIP as final until you signal product+tests ready.

Use Solar output as support, not a blocker unless it flags a clear correctness issue. Keep your current claim and remember commit queue + git:index/head before any staging.
